Dear Students,

The Placement Test is going to be administered face-to-face on Dudullu campus on September 19 - 20 - 21, 2023 for students admitted to the English Preparatory Programme with YKS- DGS - YÖS and for those who want to take optional preparatory education. The students may take the exam in any of the sessions listed below.

Taking the Placement Test is compulsory

for students who are enrolled in English medium of instruction programs and for those who want to take optional preparatory education.

The students whose level is B1 and above are entitled to take DÜİYES which is going to be administered on Dudullu campus on September 25, 2023. More information about Doğuş University English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be provided on our website announcements.
